extension_name.description: The display name for the extension.

extension_description.message: Capture web content and send it directly to Drafts app with keyboard shortcuts.
extension_description.description: Description of what the extension does.

settings_title.description: Main heading on the settings page.

section_destination.description: Section heading for choosing save destination.

drafts_not_installed.description: Banner text when Drafts app is not detected.

drafts_not_installed_fallback.message: Content will be saved to Share Sheet.
drafts_not_installed_fallback.description: Explanation shown when Drafts is not installed.

get_drafts.description: Link to download Drafts from the App Store.

dest_share_sheet.description: Label for Share Sheet destination option.

section_format.description: Section heading for output format settings.

label_default_tag.description: Label for the default tag input.

placeholder_default_tag.description: Placeholder text for the default tag input.

placeholder_template.message: Use placeholders: {title}, {url}, {content}, {timestamp}, {tag}. More date/time options are below.
placeholder_template.description: Placeholder text for the template textarea.

advanced_settings.description: Accordion label for advanced settings section.

section_drafts_url.description: Section heading for URL scheme configuration.

label_how_to_send.description: Label for URL scheme mode selection.

mode_create_url.description: Label for Create URL mode option.

mode_action_url.description: Label for Action URL mode option.

label_drafts_action_name.description: Label for the Drafts action name input.

placeholder_drafts_action.message: Optional for Create URL; required for Action URL
placeholder_drafts_action.description: Placeholder for the Drafts action name input.

help_drafts_action.message: Create URL can optionally run an action after creating the draft. Action URL requires an action name.
help_drafts_action.description: Help text explaining the two Drafts URL modes.

section_capture.description: Section heading for content extraction settings.

label_content_selectors.message: Where to find article text (CSS selectors)
label_content_selectors.description: Label for the content selectors textarea.

placeholder_content_selectors.message: Enter CSS selectors to find article content, one per line
placeholder_content_selectors.description: Placeholder for the content selectors textarea.

label_custom_filters.description: Label for the custom filters textarea.

placeholder_custom_filters.message: Enter CSS selectors for elements to remove, one per line
placeholder_custom_filters.description: Placeholder for the custom filters textarea.

section_selector_finder.description: Section heading for the AI selector finder tool.

help_selector_finder.message: Analyze a web page to find the best CSS selectors for extracting article content.
help_selector_finder.description: Help text for the selector finder.

privacy_selector_finder.message: Privacy note: when you click Analyze Page, the URL and a processed copy of that page's HTML are sent to the Selector Finder service and Gemini for analysis. Requests are processed transiently and are not saved by Cat Scratches.
privacy_selector_finder.description: Privacy notice for the selector finder.

label_found_content_selector.description: Label for the content selector result.

label_found_elements_to_ignore.description: Label for the elements to remove result.

btn_add_selectors.description: Button to add found selectors to settings.

btn_reset.description: Button to reset all settings to defaults.

status_using_defaults.description: Status message when default settings are loaded.

status_saved_icloud.description: Status message when settings are saved to iCloud.

status_saved_local.description: Status message when settings are saved locally.

status_save_failed.message: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
status_save_failed.description: Error message when saving settings fails.

status_no_changes.description: Status message when there are no changes to save.

status_reset_success.description: Status message when settings are reset.

status_reset_failed.message: Failed to reset settings. Please try again.
status_reset_failed.description: Error message when resetting settings fails.

status_selectors_added.message: Selectors added! Click "Save Settings" to keep them.
status_selectors_added.description: Status message when selectors are added from finder.

validation_min_content_length.message: Minimum content length must be a positive number
validation_min_content_length.description: Validation error for minimum content length.

validation_link_ratio.message: Link ratio must be between 0 and 1

validation_action_required.message: Drafts Action Name is required when Action URL is selected.
validation_action_required.description: Validation error when action name is missing.

error_enter_url.description: Error when URL field is empty.

error_prefix.description: Prefix for error alerts shown to the user.

error_action_required.message: Cat Scratches Error: Action URL mode requires a Drafts Action Name in Advanced Settings.
error_action_required.description: Error when action name is not set but action URL mode is selected.

error_content_too_large.message: Content too large to send to $APP_NAME$. Try selecting a smaller portion of the page.
error_content_too_large.description: Error when content exceeds URL length limit.

error_share_not_supported.message: System sharing is not supported in this browser context.
error_share_not_supported.description: Error when Web Share API is not available.

version_label.description: Version label shown in settings header.
